name_cn:
In Stock ✔️{Nuttwood & White}
MIUMIU New Gymnasium Series Handbag
The new Wander Crescent Bag is a collision of colors, eye-catching, sporty yet stylish, perfectly blending sports and fashion. It is a high-level street-stopping essential; the long shoulder strap allows for a crossbody look that is even more playful and cute 🫶
Style No.: 5BC125/5746
Size: 22x23x7cm (LxHxW)
